Head: pr/01-fs-risk-matrix
Title: feat(fs): add overwrite risk matrix and granular permission model
Body:
## Summary
- Add overwrite risk classification matrix in fs ops.
- Add granular force requirement mapping.
- Establish shared write-permission evaluation behavior.

## Validation
- Unit tests for risk matrix and force mapping.

Head: pr/02-base-client-resolver
Title: feat(base-client): enforce granular overwrite flags in resolver
Body:
## Summary
- Integrate risk matrix into output-path resolver.
- Add granular force/no-force controls and confirmation flow.
- Improve conflict handling consistency across file writes.

## Validation
- Unit tests for overwrite policy enforcement.

Head: pr/03-solutions-adoption
Title: feat(solutions): adopt core file-resolution policy
Body:
## Summary
- Route solutions backup/build artifacts through shared resolver.
- Ensure consistent conflict behavior for server-downloaded artifacts.

## Validation
- Solutions-focused tests updated/added.

Head: pr/04-zdatatable-adoption
Title: feat(zdatatable): adopt file-resolution safeguards
Body:
## Summary
- Apply centralized file conflict policy to zdatatable flows.
- Keep output handling behavior consistent with core rules.

## Validation
- Zdatatable regression tests.

Head: pr/05-export-all-adoption
Title: feat(export-all): apply resolver policy across export orchestration
Body:
## Summary
- Integrate core file-resolution policy into export-all pipelines.
- Standardize artifact output conflict handling.

## Validation
- Export-all tests.

Head: pr/06-cli-wiring
Title: feat(cli): register shared file-resolution options
Body:
## Summary

## Validation

Head: pr/07-service-modules-adoption
Title: feat(modules): adopt core file-resolution policy across service exporters
Body:
## Summary
- Apply centralized conflict policy to BAQ/BOReader/EFX/FileService/MetaFX paths.
- Remove module-specific divergence in overwrite behavior.

## Validation
- Service/module execution sanity checks.

Head: pr/08-kineticcore-safeguard
Title: feat(core): add cache-write safeguard for high-risk paths
Body:
## Summary
- Add backup-before-overwrite safeguard for high-risk cache write scenarios.
- Align KineticCore write behavior with policy expectations.

## Validation
- Core behavior sanity checks.

Head: pr/09-architecture-rfc
Title: docs(architecture): add state-of-truth and zero-trust CI/CD RFC drafts
Body:
## Summary
- Add architecture discussion drafts for state-of-truth and zero-trust CI/CD.
- Discussion-only docs PR (no runtime changes).

Head: pr/10-security-scanner-hardening
Title: feat(security): harden sensitive-data scanner exclusions and path scoping
Body:
## Summary
- Fix exclusion path normalization (exports, .\exports, ./exports).
- Ensure explicit --path scopes file and git-history scanning.
- Re-add exports/ ignore where needed for local artifacts.

## Validation
- Added scanner exclusion regression tests.
- Verified explicit ./exports scan behavior.

Body:

- Add/refresh script helpers for local tooling workflows.
